_comment: Curated allowlist of local directories whose documents are mapped into the graph by scripts/document-index.js. Copy this to ../document-sources.json and edit. The change-gate ONLY ever looks inside these roots, so the graph never fills with framework/tutorial boilerplate. `tags` apply to every Source ingested from that root. Paths may start with ~. Text (.md/.markdown/.txt/.rst) is hashed as UTF-8; binary (.pdf/.docx/.pptx) as bytes (extracted by your agent). Add an extension to enable it.
